title: Replace unix with syscall to allow vendoring into libpod
body:
unix constants do not work when vendored into libpod, because
libpod can potentially be used on non unix platforms, so
compilation blows up.  Switching to syscall should fix this issue.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
LGTM
But I must say I'm surprised by the small number of changes, I would have guessed we'd more instances.
Huh. LGTM. Syscall is deprecated, so the right way to do this would be conditional compilation, but errno constants ought to be fine.
@TomSweeneyRedHat You need to approve this so bors will succeed, I believe.
